'''chazhada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicholaism|nicholaism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-zh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicholaism|nicholaism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chazhada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæzhædæth|chæzhædæth]] || [[word:chæzhædæj|chæzhædæj]] || [[word:chæzhædæsh|chæzhædæsh]] || [[word:chæzhædæ|chæzhædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chazhazhadath|chazhazhadath]] || [[word:chazhazhadaj|chazhazhadaj]] || [[word:chazhazhadash|chazhazhadash]] || [[word:chazhazhada|chazhazhada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chazhadath|chazhadath]] || [[word:chazhadaj|chazhadaj]] || [[word:chazhadash|chazhadash]] || [[word:chazhada|chazhada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chazhafdath|chazhafdath]] || [[word:chazhafdaj|chazhafdaj]] || [[word:chazhafdash|chazhafdash]] || [[word:chazhafdaf|chazhafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chazhadatha|chazhadatha]] || [[word:chazhadaja|chazhadaja]] || [[word:chazhadasha|chazhadasha]] || [[word:chazhadaka|chazhadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chazhadath|chazhadath]] || [[word:chazhadaj|chazhadaj]] || [[word:chazhadash|chazhadash]] || [[word:chazhada|chazhada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chazhadathal|chazhadathal]] || [[word:chazhadajal|chazhadajal]] || [[word:chazhadashal|chazhadashal]] || [[word:chazhadakal|chazhadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chazhadathatha|chazhadathatha]] || [[word:chazhadajaja|chazhadajaja]] || [[word:chazhadashasha|chazhadashasha]] || [[word:chazhadaka|chazhadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chazhadathan|chazhadathan]] || [[word:chazhadajan|chazhadajan]] || [[word:chazhadashan|chazhadashan]] || [[word:chazhadakan|chazhadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chazhadathaoro|chazhadathaoro]] || [[word:chazhadajaoro|chazhadajaoro]] || [[word:chazhadashaoro|chazhadashaoro]] || [[word:chazhadakaoro|chazhadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
